about.feature.billing.desc: Flexible pricing models with token-based billing, top-up system, and usage analytics.
about.feature.monitoring.desc: Real-time channel health monitoring, response time tracking, and uptime statistics.
about.feature.providers.desc: Supports OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, DeepSeek, Moonshot, Zhipu, Qwen, Azure, AWS, and more.
about.feature.rateLimit.desc: Protect your infrastructure with configurable rate limits per user, model, and global thresholds.
about.feature.unifiedApi.desc: Access OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, and 40+ providers through a single OpenAI-compatible API endpoint.
about.feature.userManagement.desc: Complete user lifecycle with registration, authentication, quotas, and role-based access control.
about.hero.subtitle: AI API Gateway — Aggregating 40+ upstream AI providers behind a unified API with user management, billing, rate limiting, and an admin dashboard.
